name: Triad
description: v5 — Three identical 3×3 blocks (3-2-3 seats, 30 zones): West P1/P3/P4, Mid P5/P6, East P2/P7/P8; every block mirrors school–Hub–axis with corner spawns flanking the north school; co-op P1/P2 hub-adjacent on the south slot flanked by two A-homes; Mid's south slot holds the Primal school (war-camp flanks); full Nightshade/Daylight/Primal/Arcane set; Hub-W/M/E behind unpredictable random-pool Gate-W/M/E. Direct yellow/orange inside blocks; triangle Portals Gate-W↔Gate-M↔Gate-E @ 150k. Co-op Classic · Matrix Standard.
